title: psidium rotundidiscum
intro: Psidium rotundidiscum, also known as the Guanabani or Round-disc Guava, is a species of flowering plant in the Myrtaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Psidium rotundidiscum include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, and can also be found in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
